1.description: Resolve Lillestrøm municipality name to kommunenummer and boundary geometry

2.description: Fetch parcels (teig) in Lillestrøm municipality filtered by kommunenummer

3.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard areas (utlosningomr) intersecting Lillestrøm municipality

4.description: Spatial join parcels with quick-clay hazard areas to identify parcels in hazard zones

5.description: Spatial join parcels in hazard zones with 1 km grid cells

6.description: Count parcels per 1 km grid cell

7.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending
